rag_rules: Fix 'named thing must be an expression with a type' by resolving undefined identifiers or removing invalid clauses
Move implementation-level references from component type annexes to implementation annexes
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reference only visible identifiers in their scope
Implementation-level bindings belong in implementation annexes, not type annexes
Validator diagnostics indicate syntax or scoping errors that require precise repair
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use only declared helpers or visible AADL features in AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to fix AGREE type errors; instead, resolve references or remove invalid clauses
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE annex placement in component types vs implementations
Assume/guarantee contract fusion or validation repair strategies
